title: /kernel
summary_text: For a bare `/kernel` in this environment, the minimal no-task bootstrap path is: 1. Parse as a `/kernel` request with empty focus and proceed directly into Kernel contract bootstrap (no user clarification needed). 2. Confirm provider health/gate: `glm` must be available plus at least one specialist candidate (`gemini-cli`, `cursor-cli`, or `copilot-cli`) before claiming orchestration active. 3. Establish live bootstrap lanes and require both to succeed: - `glm` reviewer lane via bridge (`glm`, role `reviewer`) returns `ok=true` with valid parsed verdict. - one specialist reviewer lane via bridge returns `ok=true` with valid parsed verdict. - these must be attempted in parallel and evidenced before first ack. 4. Build the live lane model evidence (at least advisory text + evidence JSON path) so the request context can declare: - `Codex + GLM + specialist` baseline is active. 5. Ensure the run has 6+ concurrent active lanes (4+ Codex-family lanes + glm + specialist), with at least: - one dedicated Codex simulation lane on `gpt-5.3-codex-spark`, - one execution/exploration lane, - one verification/review lane, - one monitoring/risk lane, - plus active external lanes. 6. Write/update bootstrap receipt before any valid acknowledgement: - `scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write <lane_count>=6 <providers_csv>=codex,glm,<specialist> <mode>=normal` (or `degraded-allowed` in guarded failure/recovery mode), - and set `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS=true`, `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS=true` as live evidence. 7. Only after steps 1–6 are satisfied can the first acknowledgement be emitted with exact fields: - `Kernel orchestration is active for this session.` - `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` - `Active models: ...` listing only models with live evidence, - `Lane manifest:` with >=6 flat active lanes and per-lane labels. If any required lane proof is missing or shape cannot be established, `/kernel` must fail closed (not partially acknowledge) and report blocked state rather than claiming healthy orchestration.
